messages.body:
Hey Jordan,

Looping you in on the index strategy work for our Postgres 14 → 16 migration. I can take a look at the index strategy this week and would love your read on the composite index proposal — doc attached.

Priya (cc'd) is leading the schema diff in parallel.

Thanks,
Alex

Happy to. I'll send notes by Thursday.

Jordan

Reviewed the proposal. One concern: the composite index on (tenant_id, created_at) may not help your hot query — the selectivity on tenant_id is too low in your workload pattern. Happy to jump on a call to walk through. Alex, what works for you?

Jordan

Per our call: dropping the composite index, going with two single-column indexes (tenant_id; created_at) plus a partial index for the active rows. I'll update the proposal doc tonight.

Alex

Doc updated: https://docs.acme.com/migrate/indexes-v2 — let me know if anything looks off.

Alex

Reviewed the update — looks good. 👍 Ship it.

Jordan

Thanks Jordan, appreciate the quick turnaround. Alex — I'll fold this into the schema diff today.

Priya
